description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa upholstered in a vibrant blue material, featuring a sleek and minimalist design. The sofa has a rectangular form with straight, high armrests and a backrest that are all of equal height, giving it a boxy silhouette. The seat is a single, smooth cushion, while the backrest is adorned with two large, loose rectangular cushions for added comfort. The upholstery appears to be smooth with subtle vertical channeling along the inner back and arms, adding a touch of texture. The sofa stands on four slender, cylindrical metal legs, slightly angled outward, which elevate it above the ground and contribute to its contemporary look. The overall appearance is clean, functional, and well-suited for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern parks.
description: A modern blue sofa with straight, high armrests, two large back cushions, and slim metal legs, featuring a smooth, subtly textured upholstery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sofa's two large back cushions, single seat cushion, and straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's high armrest, slim metal legs, and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, smooth backrest and the uniform height of the back and armrests.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and leg design, with a clear profile of the back cushion.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose rectangular back cushions and a single, continuous seat cushion; all cushions are uniform in size and shape.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, high armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy profile and subtle vertical channeling; fully padded and integrated into the sofa's frame.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, cylindrical metal legs positioned at the corners, slightly angled outward, with a metallic finish and exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest at the same height as the armrests, featuring subtle vertical channeling and supporting two large, loose cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue upholstery with a smooth finish and subtle vertical channeling on the inner back and arms; no visible decorative stitching or patterned fabric.
